hero.headline: Stunning Product Visuals.
hero.subheadline: Meet Flashant, your smart, friendly AI visual assistant. Turn ordinary product photos into high-converting, studio-quality masterpieces for Amazon, Shopify, and TikTok Shop — in seconds.
hero.ctaSub: No credit card required. 10 free credits monthly.

trustCloud.title: Built for Cross-Border Sellers
trustCloud.subtitle: Images auto-locked to platform compliance rules out of the box

styleShowcase.title: Four Signature Styles.
styleShowcase.subtitle: Pick your aesthetic. Click. Generate. It's that simple.

tooltips.cosmetics: Breathe elegance into your brand. Soft shadows, airy tones.
tooltips.luxury: Elevate your perceived value instantly with premium textures.
tooltips.cyber: Stop the scroll with futuristic energy. Engineered for Gen-Z.

beforeAfter.title: From Phone Snap to Studio Masterpiece
beforeAfter.desc: Drag the slider to see the Flashant difference

step1.title: Drag & Drop
step1.desc: Drop your raw product image. Our system instantly isolates the subject without losing a single edge detail.

step2.title: Wave the Magic Wand
step2.desc: Speak in your native language. Click the Magic Wand to instantly upgrade your text into highly descriptive, conversion-optimized English prompts.

step3.title: Batch Harvest
step3.desc: Run multiple style concepts together. Stash them in your Asset Grid and download the entire e-commerce launch kit in one .zip file.

roi.title: The Numbers Don't Lie.
roi.subtitle: A real cost comparison for a single product listing shoot.

bottomCta.title: Ready to Transform Your Product Images?
bottomCta.subtitle: Join 5,000+ cross-border sellers who ship studio-quality visuals in seconds, not days.
bottomCta.ctaSub: No credit card required. 10 free credits monthly.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.desc: Start free, upgrade as you grow
